info.title: Dragon Lap MVP Backend API
info.description: Single-tenant laptop store backend (NestJS + Prisma + JWT).

201.description: Registered — tokens are set as HTTP-only cookies (access_token, refresh_token)

Set-Cookie.description: access_token (5 min) and refresh_token (7 days) HTTP-only cookies

post.summary: Logout — revokes refresh token and clears auth cookies

201.description: Logged in — tokens are set as HTTP-only cookies (access_token, refresh_token)

Set-Cookie.description: access_token (5 min) and refresh_token (7 days) HTTP-only cookies

example.name: Gaming Laptops
example.description: High-performance laptops for gaming and graphics workloads

example.title: Lenovo Legion Pro 5
example.description: QHD+ display, high refresh rate, RTX graphics

get.summary: Get guest cart using guest session cookie

Set-Cookie.description: guest_session_id HTTP-only cookie is set if missing
guest_session_id HTTP-only cookie is set if missing

post.summary: Place COD order from current cart
Place guest COD order from guest cart

Set-Cookie.description: guest_session_id HTTP-only cookie is set if missing

get.summary: Get one customer order by ID

patch.summary: Update order status with transition rules (admin)

get.summary: Get store statistics and recent activity (admin only)

cookieAuth.name: access_token
cookieAuth.description: HTTP-only JWT cookie set automatically on login/register. Send requests with credentials (withCredentials: true).

slots.description: Slot names to generate signatures for. If omitted, all slots are signed.

properties.description: Use these values to construct FormData for direct Cloudinary upload

publicId.description: Cloudinary public ID of uploaded image

x-use-cases.title: Customer registration and login
x-use-cases.expectedOutcome: Customer receives JWT and can access customer endpoints

x-use-cases.title: Cart lifecycle
x-use-cases.expectedOutcome: Cart enforces stock and minimum quantity rules

x-use-cases.title: Place COD order
x-use-cases.expectedOutcome: Order created with snapshots, stock decremented, cart cleared

x-use-cases.title: Admin management
x-use-cases.expectedOutcome: Admin can operate store inventory and order workflow

x-use-cases.title: Upload laptop images via Cloudinary
mainFlow: Direct upload to Cloudinary using returned signature
x-use-cases.expectedOutcome: Laptop has 1 featured and up to 3 gallery images persisted

x-use-cases.title: Guest cart and checkout
x-use-cases.expectedOutcome: Guest can shop and checkout using guest_session_id cookie without authentication

x-scenarios.title: Happy path checkout
steps: System validates stock and creates order transactionally
x-scenarios.result: Order status = PENDING, paymentMethod = COD, cart becomes empty

x-scenarios.title: Cancel order and restore stock
steps: System increments laptop stock by order item quantities
x-scenarios.result: Order status becomes CANCELLED and stock restored once

x-test-cases.name: Reject forbidden transition
setup: Ensure order current status is DELIVERED

x-test-cases.name: Guest can add item to cart
